name: MAX2870
description: 23.5MHz to 6000MHz Fractional/Integer-N Synthesizer/VCO with integrated VCOs, dual differential outputs, 4-wire SPI interface, 32-pin TQFN

key_performance.outputs: Dual differential open-collector RF outputs (RFOUTA, RFOUTB)
key_performance.interface: 4-wire SPI (CLK, DATA, LE, MUX_OUT for readback)

pins.name: CLK
pins.description: Serial Clock Input. Data is latched into the 32-bit shift register on the rising edge of CLK.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI master clock. Maximum clock frequency per SPI timing specs. Compatible with 1.8V logic levels.

pins.name: DATA
pins.description: Serial Data Input. Serial data loaded MSB first. The 3 LSBs identify the register address.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI master MOSI. Data must be valid tDS before rising CLK edge and held tDH after.

pins.name: LE
pins.description: Load Enable Input. When LE goes high, the data stored in the shift register is loaded into the appropriate latches.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI chip-select (active-high latch). Observe tLES setup and tLEH hold times relative to CLK.

pins.name: CE
pins.description: Chip Enable. Logic-low powers the part down and the charge pump becomes high impedance.
pins.requirements: Pull high (to VCC_DIG level) for normal operation. Drive low to enter low-power shutdown mode. After CE goes high, wait ≥20ms before programming.

pins.name: SW
pins.description: Fast-Lock Switch. Connect to the loop filter when using fast-lock mode. No connect in normal mode.
pins.requirements: Leave unconnected (NC) in normal operation. In fast-lock mode, connect to loop filter node as described in register 4 fast-lock bits.

pins.name: VCC_CP
pins.description: Power Supply for Charge Pump.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V supply. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.

pins.name: CP_OUT
pins.description: Charge-Pump Output. Connect to external loop filter input.
pins.requirements: Connect directly to loop filter (typically R2 + C2 + C1 + R3 + C3 network). This node connects to TUNE (pin 20) via the loop filter.

pins.name: GND_CP
pins.description: Ground for Charge Pump.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: GND_PLL
pins.description: Ground for PLL.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: VCC_PLL
pins.description: Power Supply for PLL.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V supply. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.

pins.name: GND_RF
pins.description: Ground for RF Outputs.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: RFOUTA_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output A. Differential positive output of RF output channel A.
pins.requirements: Connect to supply through 27nH RF choke (or AC-coupled to 50Ω load). Unused output: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF and terminate with 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTA_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output A. Differential negative output of RF output channel A.
pins.requirements: Connect to supply through 27nH RF choke (or AC-coupled to 50Ω load). Unused output: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF and terminate with 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTB_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output B. Differential positive output of RF output channel B.
pins.requirements: Connect to supply through 27nH RF choke (or AC-coupled to 50Ω load). Unused output: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF and terminate with 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTB_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output B. Differential negative output of RF output channel B.
pins.requirements: Connect to supply through 27nH RF choke (or AC-coupled to 50Ω load). Unused output: connect 27nH choke to VCC_RF and terminate with 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: VCC_RF
pins.description: Power Supply for RF Output and Dividers.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V supply. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin. Also serves as bias supply for open-collector RF outputs via 27nH chokes.

pins.name: VCC_VCO
pins.description: VCO Power Supply.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V supply. Place decoupling capacitors to the analog ground plane (not the digital ground plane). Use 100nF + 1µF caps.

pins.name: GND_VCO
pins.description: Ground for VCO.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: NOISE_FILT
pins.description: VCO Noise Decoupling. Internal VCO bias decoupling node.
pins.requirements: Place a 1µF capacitor from this pin to ground. Keep trace as short as possible.

pins.name: TUNE
pins.description: Control Voltage Input to the VCO. Connected to the output of the external loop filter.
pins.requirements: Connect to the output of the loop filter (which is driven by CP_OUT via the loop filter network). Do not connect directly to CP_OUT.

pins.name: GND_TUNE
pins.description: Ground for Control Input to the VCO.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: RSET
pins.description: Charge-Pump Current Range Input. An external resistor to ground sets the minimum CP current. ICP = 1.63/RSET × (1 + CP[3:0]).
pins.requirements: Connect a resistor (2.7kΩ to 10kΩ) from this pin to GND. Typical value: 5.1kΩ sets IMIN = 0.32mA. Do not leave floating.

pins.name: BIAS_FILT
pins.description: VCO Noise Decoupling. Internal VCO bias filter node.
pins.requirements: Place a 1µF capacitor from this pin to ground. Keep trace as short as possible.

pins.name: REG
pins.description: Reference Voltage Compensation. Internal voltage reference decoupling node.
pins.requirements: Place a 1µF capacitor from this pin to ground. Keep trace as short as possible.

pins.name: LD
pins.description: Lock Detect Output. Logic-high when PLL is locked; logic-low when unlocked. Behaviour configurable via Register 5 (LDP, LDF bits).
pins.requirements: Can drive an LED (via series resistor) or MCU GPIO to indicate lock status. Output logic-high is VCC − 0.4V at 0.3mA source.

pins.name: RFOUT_EN
pins.description: RF Output Enable. Logic-low disables both RF outputs (RFOUTA and RFOUTB).
pins.requirements: Pull high for normal RF output operation. Can be driven low by MCU to mute outputs without full shutdown. RFA_EN and RFB_EN register bits provide per-output control.

pins.name: GND_DIG
pins.description: Ground for Digital Circuitry.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: VCC_DIG
pins.description: Power Supply for Digital Circuitry.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V supply. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.

pins.name: REF_IN
pins.description: Reference Frequency Input. High-impedance CMOS inverter input with nominal bias of VCC_DIG/2. Reference path includes optional ×2 doubler and ÷2 divider. Input range 10–200MHz.
pins.requirements: AC-couple to reference signal. Input sensitivity: 0.7×VCC_DIG (VPP). Input capacitance: 2pF. In shutdown mode, input is high-impedance.

pins.name: MUX_OUT
pins.description: Multiplexed Output and Serial Data Out. Function selected by MUX[3:0] bits in Register 5. Can output lock detect, SDO for register readback, divided reference, etc.
pins.requirements: Connect to MCU GPIO for lock detect or SPI MISO for register readback. Output logic-high is VCC − 0.4V at 0.3mA source. Set MUX = 1100 to enable Register 6 readback.

pins.name: GND_SD
pins.description: Ground for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to the exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: VCC_SD
pins.description: Power Supply for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V supply. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.

pins.name: EP
pins.description: Exposed Pad (thermal/ground pad). Must be soldered to board ground for proper electrical and thermal performance.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB ground plane with multiple vias. The separate GND_ signal pins (GND_CP, GND_PLL, GND_RF, GND_VCO, GND_TUNE, GND_DIG, GND_SD) should connect to the board ground plane — NOT be routed directly to EP. Let the ground plane connect them all.

required_passives.placement: VCC_CP (6), VCC_PLL (10), VCC_RF (16), VCC_VCO (17), VCC_DIG (28), VCC_SD (32) — each to GND
required_passives.reason: Supply decoupling — place as close as possible to each power pin. 100nF for high-frequency, 1µF bulk.
VCO noise decoupling — required for VCO phase noise performance. Do not omit.
VCO bias filter — required for VCO phase noise performance. Do not omit.
Reference voltage compensation — required for stable internal voltage reference. Do not omit.
Sets minimum charge-pump current. ICP_min = 1.63V / RSET. 5.1kΩ gives IMIN = 0.32mA with CP[3:0]=0000, IMAX = 5.12mA with CP[3:0]=1111.
REF_IN must be AC-coupled to the reference clock source. The pin has an internal bias at VCC_DIG/2.

required_passives.placement: VCC_RF (16) to each RF output pin (12, 13, 14, 15)
required_passives.reason: Open-collector RF output bias. Power RF outputs via RF choke from VCC_RF. Provides DC bias while blocking RF from supply.

required_passives.placement: Each RF output (RFOUTA_P/N, RFOUTB_P/N) to GND (AC or DC)
required_passives.reason: RF load termination. Unused outputs: add 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω termination to GND.

required_passives.value: Loop filter: C2=0.1µF, R2=120Ω, C1=0.012µF, R3=250Ω, C3=820pF (typical at 40kHz BW, 25MHz PFD)
required_passives.reason: PLL loop filter sets loop bandwidth and phase margin. Values from EV kit for 40kHz bandwidth at fPFD=25MHz.

application_circuits.name: Typical MAX2870 PLL frequency synthesiser
application_circuits.description: VCC_ pins (CP, PLL, RF, VCO, DIG, SD) all connected to 3.0–3.6V with 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps on each. REF_IN AC-coupled via 100nF to 10–200MHz reference oscillator. CP_OUT connected to loop filter (C2/R2/C1/R3/C3 passive network) with output driving TUNE. RFOUTA_P/N and RFOUTB_P/N each biased via 27nH choke from VCC_RF and AC-coupled to 50Ω load. NOISE_FILT, BIAS_FILT, REG each have 1µF cap to GND. RSET has 5.1kΩ to GND. CLK/DATA/LE connected to SPI master; CE pulled high; RFOUT_EN pulled high. MUX_OUT and LD to MCU GPIOs. Exposed pad soldered to ground plane with vias.

common_mistakes: GND_CP, GND_PLL, GND_RF, GND_VCO, GND_TUNE, GND_DIG, GND_SD must NOT be connected directly to the exposed paddle (EP) — each must connect to the board ground plane independently; the ground plane then connects EP
TUNE (pin 20) must NOT be connected directly to CP_OUT (pin 7) — it connects to the output of the external loop filter network
After power-up or CE assertion, registers must be programmed TWICE: once to enable the device, then again (≥20ms later) to start VCO calibration
Register programming order is mandatory: 5→4→3→2→1→0 (both times). Out-of-order writes cause undefined behaviour
NOISE_FILT (19), BIAS_FILT (23), and REG (24) MUST have 1µF caps to GND — leaving them floating causes VCO instability and degraded phase noise
RF outputs are open-collector — they require a 27nH choke to VCC_RF for bias. Do NOT connect directly to a DC supply without choke or to GND
Unused RF outputs still require 27nH choke to VCC_RF and 50Ω termination to GND — do not leave floating
REF_IN must be AC-coupled — it has an internal bias of VCC_DIG/2 which will be disturbed by DC coupling
VCC_VCO decoupling caps should connect to the analog ground plane, not the digital ground plane, for best phase noise
RSET must have a resistor to GND (2.7kΩ–10kΩ) — do not leave floating or tie directly to GND
Software shutdown (SHDN bit in Register 2) and CE pin both power down the device — after exiting, wait ≥20ms before programming
Keep loop filter components close to CP_OUT (pin 7) and TUNE (pin 20) with short, shielded traces to minimise noise coupling
notes: Six write-only and one read-only 32-bit SPI registers (addresses 0x00–0x06). Register 0x06 can be read back via MUX_OUT when MUX[3:0]=1100. Lock detect polarity and behaviour configurable via Register 5. Fast-lock mode requires SW (pin 5) connection to loop filter. VCO auto-selects from multiple internal sub-bands. Fractional-N mode supports MOD values 2–4095 and FRAC values 0 to MOD−1.

passives.description: VCC supply decoupling (×6, one per VCC pin)
VCC bulk decoupling (×6, one per VCC pin)
RSET (pin 22) to GND — sets CP current
RF choke, VCC_RF to each RF output pin (×4)
